title: Department Manager Vacancy at Asian Paints Signature Store - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Asian Paints Signature Store - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Asian Paints Signature Store are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Asian Paints Signature Store:
Asian Paints Signature Store is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store!
